workflow_name: TEST - SOTA 2026 - WF2 Graph RAG V3.3 - CORRECTED

body.query: What did Marie Curie win Nobel Prizes for?

json.query: What did Marie Curie win Nobel Prizes for?

message.content:
Marie Curie won Nobel Prizes in two different scientific fields, making her the first person to achieve this distinction. She was awarded the Nobel Prize in Physics in 1903, which she shared with her husband Pierre Curie and Henri Becquerel. This prize was awarded "in recognition of the extraordinary services they have rendered by their joint researches on the radiation phenomena discovered by Professor Henri Becquerel."

Curie then went on to win the Nobel Prize in Chemistry in 1911. This award was given to her "in recognition of her services to the advancement of chemistry by the discovery of the elements radium and polonium, by the isolation of radium and the study of the nature and compounds of this remarkable element."

Her groundbreaking work on radioactivity, a term she coined, laid the foundation for many scientific advancements in the 20th century. Curie's research led to the development of X-ray machines and cancer treatments, revolutionizing both medical diagnostics and therapy. Her discoveries also contributed significantly to our understanding of atomic structure and nuclear physics.

Marie Curie remains the only person to have won Nobel Prizes in two different sciences, a testament to her exceptional contributions to both physics and chemistry. Her achievements continue to inspire scientists and researchers around the world, cementing her legacy as one of the most influential figures in the history of science.

json.query:
MATCH (n)
WHERE ((n.name IN $entity_names
      OR ANY(ename IN $entity_names WHERE toLower(n.name) CONTAINS toLower(ename))
      OR ANY(ename IN $entity_names WHERE toLower(ename) CONTAINS toLower(n.name)))
      OR toLower(n.name) IN [x IN $entity_names | toLower(x)]
      OR ANY(ename IN $entity_names WHERE size(ename) > 3 AND toLower(n.name) CONTAINS toLower(ename)))
  AND (n.tenant_id = $tenant_id OR n.tenant_id IS NULL)
WITH n,
     CASE
       WHEN n:Organization THEN 1.3
       WHEN n:Person THEN 1.2
       WHEN n:City THEN 1.1
       WHEN n:Museum THEN 1.2
       WHEN n:Technology THEN 1.0
       WHEN n:Disease THEN 1.0
       ELSE 0.9
     END as entity_priority
ORDER BY entity_priority DESC
LIMIT 10

OPTIONAL MATCH path = (n)-[r*1..3]-(m)
WHERE (m.tenant_id = $tenant_id OR m.tenant_id IS NULL)
WITH path, n as startNode, entity_priority,
     reduce(score = entity_priority, rel IN relationships(path) |
       score + CASE type(rel)
         WHEN 'A_CREE' THEN 1.5
         WHEN 'CAUSE_PAR' THEN 1.4
         WHEN 'CONNECTE' THEN 1.3
         WHEN 'PROTEGE_CONTRE' THEN 1.3
         WHEN 'ETUDIE' THEN 1.2
         WHEN 'UTILISE' THEN 1.2
         WHEN 'CIBLE' THEN 1.2
         WHEN 'EXPOSE_A' THEN 1.1
         WHEN 'VISE_A_LIMITER' THEN 1.1
         WHEN 'SOUS_ENSEMBLE_DE' THEN 1.0
         WHEN 'ETEND' THEN 1.0
         ELSE 0.8
       END
     ) as path_score,
     length(path) as path_length

WHERE path_score > (path_length * 0.3)

RETURN
  startNode.name as start_entity,
  [node IN nodes(path) | {name: node.name, type: labels(node)[0]}] as path_nodes,
  [rel IN relationships(path) | type(rel)] as path_relations,
  path_score,
  path_length
ORDER BY path_score DESC
LIMIT $max_results

error.name: NodeOperationError

parameters.query:
=SELECT summary, relevance_score, entity_names 
FROM community_summaries 
WHERE entity_names && ARRAY[{{ $('Neo4j Query Builder (Deep Traversal V2)').json.entities.map(e => "'" + e.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]::text[]
  AND tenant_id = '{{ $('OTEL Init').json.user_context.tenant_id }}'
ORDER BY relevance_score DESC 
LIMIT 5
